sara.intro_descriptor: a musician who travels the world, tends a farm, and paints. Her artist name is Sarita
sara.naming_rule: Default to "Sara" when addressing her in the readings. Shift to "Sarita" only when the moment is specifically about her artist self — the musician on stage or on the road, the painter at the canvas, the muse, the part of her that creates and is witnessed. Sara is the woman; Sarita is the art. Use either name sparingly — no more than three total mentions across the page. Never use both names in the same sentence.
sara.vedic_chips: Libra ASC · Virgo Sun · Capricorn Moon · Rahu Dasha · Mars Conjunct Lagna

baelyn.intro_descriptor: a practitioner of the ceremonial arts (The Way of Tea, Zen tradition), a writer, and a dancer. She is grounded in divine feminine embodiment, sacred ritual, depth psychology, and Vedic mysticism. The reading should honor all of these registers — esoteric, embodied, contemplative, sacred — and assume she meets symbolic and mystical language at full depth
baelyn.naming_rule: Default to "Baelyn" when addressing her in the readings. Shift to "Baelyn Elspeth" only on solemn moments — the deepest invocation, the sacred address, the ritual frame. The longer form is reserved. Use her name sparingly — no more than three total mentions across the page.
baelyn.vedic_chips: Libra ASC · Leo Sun · Scorpio Moon · Moon Dasha · Jupiter Conjunct Lagna · Mars Conjunct Lagna
